name: amazon-bedrock-agentcore-filesearch-app
description: Amazon Bedrock Agent Core file search app — task runner for local setup

scripts.localhost:setup:python:venv: python3.12 -m venv "$HOME/runtime_data/python_venvs/Amazon-Bedrock-AgentCore-FileSearch-App" && "$HOME/runtime_data/python_venvs/Amazon-Bedrock-AgentCore-FileSearch-App/bin/pip" install --upgrade pip && "$HOME/runtime_data/python_venvs/Amazon-Bedrock-AgentCore-FileSearch-App/bin/pip" install -r requirements.txt
